arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta teases January reinforcements for Arsenal amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Arsenal could look to bring in fresh talent in January after an injury-stricken start to the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal considering move for Dan Ashworth after Man United exit
arts.sum: Arsenal are considering a move to bring Dan Ashworth in as the club’s new sporting director, following his shock exit at Manchester United. A mutual decision was made for Ashworth to leave his role at Manchester United this week, just five months after his appointment at Old Trafford. arts.ttl: ‘If he stayed’: Martin Keown says Arsenal sold a young striker who could’ve been as good as Thierry Henry
arts.sum: Arsenal have sold a number of young players who have gone on to become superstars in recent times. Serge Gnabry has become an elite player...

arts.ttl: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta: ‘I’m impressed by Monaco.’
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of Arsenal’s UEFA Champions League encounter against AS Monaco, Mikel Arteta gave his verdict on the Principality club, who head into Wednesday night’s match at the Emirates Stadium…

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s huge 40% transfer clause revealed – Gunners looking long term
arts.sum: Nuno Tavares joined Lazio from Arsenal on a loan deal in the summer transfer window and the Roman club could sign him permanently if certain conditions are met. So far, the left-back is enjoying a great spell at Lazio. arts.ttl: ‘So angry’: Ian Wright says he was fuming with one Arsenal player after Sunday’s game vs Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal were frustrated again at the weekend as they drew 1-1 with Fulham at Craven Cottage. That’s the third game running that Arsenal have dropped...

arts.ttl: Barcelona leave Nico Williams to Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal have received a massive boost to their hopes of signing Nico Williams after Barcelona ’s interest in the Euro 2024 star subsided. Arsenal journalist Charles Watts says that Arteta wants to sign an attacker during the January transfer window as he feels the Gunners are lightgweight in this area.

arts.ttl: Sources: Man United trying to wrap up £3m deal for wonderkid with Arsenal also in talks to sign him
‘We are not here to hide’ – AS Monaco promise to be ‘brave’ against Arsenal
arts.sum: “On paper, Arsenal are maybe the strongest opponent,” said AS Monaco vice-captain Thilo Kehrer, previewing Wednesday’s UEFA Champions League encounter against the Gunners. However, that won’t stint the Principality club’s ambition…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta pushing Arsenal over renewal – Movement in recent days on 2 year deal
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Thomas Partey is in his final year of contract and his future beyond this season needs to be clarified. The midfielder has struggled with injuries over the past few years, but things have looked good for him this season, with 20 appearances in all competitions.
